title: Quasars
script_summary: This script explains the fascinating nature of quasars while keeping the audience engaged with curiosity and wonder.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about quasars than social media does.
Quasars are incredibly bright objects powered by supermassive black holes at the centers of distant galaxies.
They can outshine entire galaxies, emitting more energy than a trillion suns combined!
But here's the twist: we’re not entirely sure how they form or evolve over time.
Their light takes billions of years to reach us, meaning we’re seeing them as they were in the early universe.
Want to dive deeper into the mysteries of space? Hit that follow button for more!
